---
id: run-precheck
title: "Precheck"
description: "Simple operation for customer preliminary scoring. Returns a possible credit amount the customer"

hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Precheck"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/financing/v1/scorings/precheck/extended"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Simple operation for customer preliminary scoring. Returns a possible credit amount the customer 
can obtain. It is best suitable for identifying clients who will probably be rejected. 
Take into account that positive recommendation can not guarantee customer's approval as the result 
is based only on a few elementary pieces of information about the customer.

Resource has to be called with valid access token (see the [Security section](./security)) 
from your server. If you plan to integrate it in a client flow, you should implement REST endpoint 
bound to your shopping basket session that will be used as a proxy to call HC API - 
**NEVER put access token directly to client side.**

Possible error codes explanation:

| Status code | Code            | Explanation          |
| ----------- | --------------- | -------------------- |
| 400         | INVALID_REQUEST  | Request was not well formatted (malformed request syntax, size too large, etc.) |
| 500         | FAILURE | Internal failure |


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["customer"],"properties":{"customer":{"type":"object","required":["firstName","lastName","email","phone","externalId"],"properties":{"firstName":{"type":"string","example":"John","description":"Customer first (given) name. String values longer than 100 characters will be shortened to 100 characters."},"lastName":{"type":"string","example":"Newborn","description":"Customer last (family) name. String values longer than 100 characters will be shortened to 100 characters."},"email":{"type":"string","example":"john.newborn@country.com","description":"E-mail address of customer. MUST be valid email according to [RFC 2822](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc2822)."},"phone":{"type":"string","example":"+420777123456","description":"Mobile phone number with country code (including leading `+`)."},"externalId":{"type":"string","example":"1576849","description":"Unique customer's identifier in partner's system. Typically used for linking request and response together."}},"title":"PrecheckCustomer"}},"title":"ScoringData"},"example":{"customer":{"firstName":"John","lastName":"Newborn","email":"john.newborn@country.com","phone":"+420777123456","externalId":"1576849"}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"OK","headers":{},"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["id","recommendation","customer","potentialCreditAmount"],"properties":{"id":{"type":"string","example":"1234","description":"Unique identificator of Precheck. Send this identificator in ApplicationRequest to improve approval rate."},"recommendation":{"type":"boolean","description":"A recommendation of whether the order should be passed to the HCO.\n\n    true = Application is likely going to be approved.\nfalse = Application is likely going to be rejected."},"message":{"type":"string","example":"V HCO peněžence nemáte dostatečný limit.","description":"Custom message for customer."},"customer":{"type":"object","required":["firstName","lastName","email","phone","externalId"],"properties":{"firstName":{"type":"string","example":"John","description":"Customer first (given) name. String values longer than 100 characters will be shortened to 100 characters."},"lastName":{"type":"string","example":"Newborn","description":"Customer last (family) name. String values longer than 100 characters will be shortened to 100 characters."},"email":{"type":"string","example":"john.newborn@country.com","description":"E-mail address of customer. MUST be valid email according to [RFC 2822](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc2822)."},"phone":{"type":"string","example":"+420777123456","description":"Mobile phone number with country code (including leading `+`)."},"externalId":{"type":"string","example":"1576849","description":"Unique customer's identifier in partner's system. Typically used for linking request and response together."}},"title":"PrecheckCustomer"},"potentialCreditAmount":{"type":"object","required":["amount","currency"],"properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","example":133000,"description":"Amount in minor units (133000 represents 1330) [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"},"currency":{"type":"string","example":"CZK","description":"Amount currency [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217). Only local currency is allowed (CZK in Czech Republic and EUR in Slovakia)."}},"title":"AmountOld"}},"title":"PrecheckResult"},"examples":{"response":{"value":{"recommendation":false,"message":"V HCO peněžence nemáte dostatečný limit.","id":"1234","customer":{"firstName":"John","lastName":"Newborn","email":"john.newborn@country.com","phone":"+420777123456","externalId":"1576849"},"potentialCreditAmount":{"amount":133000,"currency":"CZK"}}}}}}},"400":{"description":"Error in processing request","headers":{},"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["errors"],"properties":{"errors":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["code","message","severity"],"properties":{"code":{"type":"string","example":"BAD_REQUEST","description":"Unique internal error code"},"message":{"type":"string","example":"Bad request","description":"Human readable error description (non-localized)"},"severity":{"type":"string","enum":["ERROR","WARN","INFO"]},"attribute":{"type":"string","example":"customer.addresses[1].streetNumber","description":"JSON path of request attribute that caused the error (if applicable)"},"ticketId":{"type":"string","example":"UAT1:AMS:20160516-091658.450:45e4","description":"Internal ticket ID, used for error backtracking"}},"title":"Error"},"description":"Array with errors"}},"title":"Errors"},"examples":{"response":{"value":{"errors":[{"code":"BAD_REQUEST","message":"Bad request","severity":"ERROR","attribute":"customer.addresses[1].streetNumber","ticketId":"UAT1:AMS:20160516-091658.450:45e4"}]}}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
